testcase.name: validateAndNormalizeTarget › accepts a minimal valid request
validateAndNormalizeTarget › accepts a valid spec path inside tests
validateAndNormalizeTarget › normalizes backslashes in spec paths
validateAndNormalizeTarget › accepts a valid grep value
validateAndNormalizeTarget › accepts valid workers in the allowed range
validateAndNormalizeTarget › rejects an absolute spec path
validateAndNormalizeTarget › rejects a spec path outside tests
validateAndNormalizeTarget › rejects parent-directory traversal in spec path
validateAndNormalizeTarget › rejects a spec path without .spec.ts suffix
validateAndNormalizeTarget › rejects an empty grep value
validateAndNormalizeTarget › rejects grep values longer than 200 characters
validateAndNormalizeTarget › rejects workers below the allowed range
validateAndNormalizeTarget › rejects workers above the allowed range
